zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Verch Gruffydd於大約1440年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Griffith Ap Rhys42歲，母親Sionet verch David41歲。她於1460年與Hamel ap Evan在英國威爾斯結婚。她去世於大約1532年享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Verch Gruffydd于大约1440年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲Griffith Ap Rhys42岁，母亲Sionet verch David41岁。她于1460年与Hamel ap Evan在英国威尔斯结婚。她去世于大约1532年享年94岁。

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Verch Gruffydd was born about 1440, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Griffith Ap Rhys, was 42 and her mother, Sionet verch David, was 41. She married Hamel ap Evan in 1460, in Wales, United Kingdom. She died about 1532, at the age of 94.

fr.Mostyn, Flint, Wales: Mostyn, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Verch Gruffydd est née environ 1440, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Griffith Ap Rhys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sionet verch David, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Hamel ap Evan en 1460, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée environ 1532, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Verch Gruffydd um 1440 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Griffith Ap Rhys 42 und ihre Mutter Sionet verch David 41. Sie hat 1460 in Wales, United Kingdom Hamel ap Evan geheiratet. Sie starb um 1532 im Alter von 94 Jahren.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Verch Gruffydd родилась около 1440 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Griffith Ap Rhys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sionet verch David, 41.
